markdown.headingText: **I. TỒN KHO TẤM PIN ĐẾN ** `r now`
markdown.markdown:
```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE} #library(plyr) library(dplyr) library(ggplot2) library(repr) library(dplyr) library(DT) library(highcharter) library(readxl) library(shiny) #library(shinydashboard) library(tidyr) library(stringr) library(dplyr) library(tidyverse) library(formattable) library(scales) library(crosstalk) library(reactable) library(stringi) #library(rgdal) library(ggthemes) library(ggiraph) library(googlesheets4) library(shinydashboard) library(shinyWidgets) writeLines( paste0('{"buildTime": "', format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"), '"}'), "last-build.json" ) ``` ```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE} nv_aio <- read_excel("data/nv_aio_bc.xlsx") ton_di_duong <- read_excel("data/ton_di_duong_bc.xlsx") ton_wms <- read_excel("data/ton_wms_bc.xlsx") ton_chuanhap <- read_excel("data/ton_chuanhap.xlsx") khu_vuc <- read_excel("data/ton_chuanhap.xlsx", sheet = "Sheet2") nv_b2b <- read_excel("data/ton_chuanhap.xlsx", sheet = "B2B") now <- format( as.POSIXct(Sys.time(), tz = "Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh"), "%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S" ) ``` ```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE} nv_aio <- left_join(nv_aio, khu_vuc, by = "ma_moi") ton_di_duong <- left_join(ton_di_duong, khu_vuc, by = "ma_moi") ton_di_duong$Loai_kho <- "CNCT" ton_wms <- left_join(ton_wms, khu_vuc, by = "ma_moi") nv_b2b <- left_join(nv_b2b, khu_vuc, by = "ma_moi") ton_chuanhap$Loai_kho <- "CNCT" ``` ```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE} ton_wms %>% group_by(ma_moi, KV, Loai_pin) %>% summarise(tong_ton_wms = sum(so_pin), kho_kv_wms = sum(so_pin[Loai_kho == "KV1" | Loai_kho == "KV2" | Loai_kho == "KV3"], na.rm = TRUE), kho_cnct_wms = sum(so_pin[Loai_kho == "CNCT"], na.rm = TRUE), kho_ttqh_wms = sum(so_pin[Loai_kho == "TTQH"], na.rm = TRUE), kho_cn_wms = sum(so_pin[Loai_kho == "CN"], na.rm = TRUE), kho_cn_coHD_wms = sum(so_pin[Loai_kho == "CN" & so_HD > 0], na.rm = TRUE)) -> ton_wms_bc ton_di_duong %>% group_by(ma_moi, KV, Loai_pin) %>% summarise(tong_ton_diduong = sum(so_pin_hd), kho_cnct_diduong = sum(so_pin_hd[Loai_kho == "CNCT"], na.rm = TRUE)) -> ton_diduong_bc ton_chuanhap %>% group_by(ma_moi, KV, Loai_pin) %>% summarise(tong_ton_chuanhap = sum(so_pin), kho_cnct_chuanhap = sum(so_pin[Loai_kho == "CNCT"], na.rm = TRUE)) -> ton_chuanhap_bc ``` ```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE} nv_aio %>% group_by(ma_moi, KV, Loai_pin) %>% summarise(tong_so_HD = sum(so_HD), tong_gtri_HD = sum(gtri_HD)/10^6, tong_pin_b2c = sum(so_pin_hd), so_HD_tamung = sum(so_da_tam_ung), so_pin_tamung = sum(so_pin_tam_ung)) -> nv_aio_bc nv_b2b %>% filter(hang_hethong != "Đã xuất ra công trình") %>% group_by(ma_moi, KV, Loai_pin) %>% summarise(tong_pin_b2b = sum(so_pin)) -> nv_b2b_bc ``` ```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE} ###BẢNG TỔNG HỢP tong_ton <- full_join(ton_wms_bc, ton_diduong_bc, by = c("ma_moi", "KV", "Loai_pin")) tong_ton <- full_join(tong_ton, ton_chuanhap_bc, by = c("ma_moi", "KV", "Loai_pin")) tong_ton[is.na(tong_ton)] <- 0 tong_ton <- tong_ton %>% mutate(tong_ton = tong_ton_wms + tong_ton_diduong + tong_ton_chuanhap, ton_kv = kho_kv_wms, ton_cnct = kho_cnct_wms + kho_cnct_diduong + kho_cnct_chuanhap, kho_cn_noHD = kho_cn_wms - kho_cn_coHD_wms) tong_ton <- tong_ton[c(1:3, 14, 4, 10, 12, 15, 16, 7, 8,9,17)] tong_ton <- full_join(tong_ton, nv_aio_bc, by = c("ma_moi", "KV", "Loai_pin")) tong_ton <- full_join(tong_ton, nv_b2b_bc, by = c("ma_moi", "KV", "Loai_pin")) tong_ton[is.na(tong_ton)] <- 0 tong_ton <- tong_ton %>% mutate(tong_pin_can = so_pin_tamung + tong_pin_b2b, du_pin_saucap = tong_ton - tong_pin_can) tong_ton <- tong_ton[-c(14:17)] tong_ton <- tong_ton %>% mutate(ma_moi = case_when( ma_moi == "COV1-Công ty CP Công trình Viettel" ~ "0COV1", ma_moi == "COV2-Công ty CP Công trình Viettel" ~ "0COV2", ma_moi == "COV3-Công ty CP Công trình Viettel" ~ "0COV3", TRUE ~ ma_moi )) tong_ton <- tong_ton %>% filter(Loai_pin != "TCT_Pin khác" & Loai_pin != "CN_Pin khác" ) tong_ton <- tong_ton %>% arrange(Loai_pin, KV, ma_moi) tong_ton %>% group_by(Loai_pin) %>% summarise(tong_ton = sum(tong_ton), tong_ton_wms = sum(tong_ton_wms), tong_ton_diduong = sum(tong_ton_diduong), tong_ton_chuanhap = sum(tong_ton_chuanhap), ton_kv = sum(ton_kv), ton_cnct = sum(ton_cnct), kho_ttqh_wms = sum(kho_ttqh_wms), kho_cn_wms = sum(kho_cn_wms), kho_cn_coHD_wms = sum(kho_cn_coHD_wms), kho_cn_noHD = sum(kho_cn_noHD), so_pin_tamung = sum(so_pin_tamung), tong_pin_b2b = sum(tong_pin_b2b), tong_pin_can = sum(tong_pin_can), du_pin_saucap = sum(du_pin_saucap)) -> tong_ton_x tong_ton_x$ma_moi <- "Tổng" tong_ton_x$KV <- "Tổng" tong_ton_x <- tong_ton_x[c(16, 17, 1:15)] tong_ton <- rbind(tong_ton_x, tong_ton) ``` ### **1. Tổng quan** ```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE} kq1x <- unlist(tong_ton[1]) kq2x <- unlist(tong_ton[2]) kq3x <- unlist(tong_ton[3]) kq4x <- accounting(unlist(tong_ton[c(1:nrow(tong_ton)),4]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",") kq5x <- accounting(unlist(tong_ton[c(1:nrow(tong_ton)),5]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",") kq12x,kq13x,kq14x,kq15x,kq16x,kq17x) tong_ton_tb[4:17] <- lapply(tong_ton_tb[4:17], as.numeric) rownames(tong_ton_tb) <- NULL ``` ```{r,out.width = '150%', echo = FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE} Biểu đồ tồn kho - pin cần cấp** #### **2.1. Tỷ lệ pin cần cấp so với pin tồn kho** ```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE} ###BẢNG BIỂU ĐỒ tong_ton[-c(1:5),c(1:4,16)] -> plot_ton plot_ton %>% mutate( ty_le = tong_pin_can*100/tong_ton ) -> plot_ton ``` ```{r,out.width = '150%',fig.width=7, fig.height=4, echo = FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE} library(dplyr) library(jsonlite) library(highcharter) library(htmlwidgets) library(htmltools) # ── Chuẩn bị data ────────────────────────────────────────── thu_tu_kv <- plot_ton %>% group_by(KV) %>% summarise(tong = sum(tong_ton, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% arrange(desc(tong)) %>% pull(KV) plot_ton$KV <- factor(plot_ton$KV, levels = thu_tu_kv) plot_ton <- plot_ton %>% arrange(KV, ma_moi) # Lấy danh sách Loai_pin loai_pin_list <- sort(unique(plot_ton$Loai_pin)) default_pin <- "Longi 615" # Lọc data mặc định plot_default <- plot_ton %>% filter(Loai_pin == default_pin) # Toàn bộ data theo JSON để JS filter plot_ton_json <- plot_ton %>% mutate(across(where(is.factor), as.character)) all_data_json <- toJSON(plot_ton_json, auto_unbox = TRUE, na = "null") loai_pin_json <- toJSON(loai_pin_list, auto_unbox = TRUE) # ── Hàm tạo chart từ data đã lọc ─────────────────────────── make_chart_data <- function(df) { kv_groups <- df %>% mutate(idx = row_number() - 1) %>% group_by(KV) %>% summarise(n_cols = n(), .groups = "drop") list( ma_moi = df$ma_moi, tong_ton = round(df$tong_ton, 0), tong_pin_can = round(df$tong_pin_can, 0), ty_le = round(df$ty_le, 0), kv_groups = list( KV = as.character(kv_groups$KV), n_cols = kv_groups$n_cols ), n_total = nrow(df) ) } default_data <- make_chart_data(plot_default) default_data_json <- toJSON( list( ma_moi = as.character(default_data$ma_moi), tong_ton = default_data$tong_ton, tong_pin_can = default_data$tong_pin_can, ty_le = default_data$ty_le, kv_groups = list( KV = as.character(default_data$kv_groups$KV), n_cols = default_data$kv_groups$n_cols ), n_total = default_data$n_total ), auto_unbox = TRUE, na = "null" ) # ── Tạo filter dropdown ───────────────────────────────────── filter_ui <- div( style = "margin-bottom: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;", tags$label("Loại pin:", style = "font-weight:bold; font-family:Cambria; font-size:14px;"), tags$select( id = "filter_loai_pin", style = "padding:4px 10px; font-size:13px; font-family:Cambria; border:1px solid #ccc; border-radius:4px; cursor:pointer;", lapply(loai_pin_list, function(p) { if (p == default_pin) { tags$option(value = p, selected = "selected", p) } else { tags$option(value = p, p) } }) ) ) # ── Tạo highchart ─────────────────────────────────────────── hc <- highchart() %>% hc_chart(type = "column", marginBottom = 80, width = NULL, # ← NULL = tự động full width reflow = TRUE ) %>% hc_xAxis( categories = default_data$ma_moi, labels = list(style = list(fontSize = "11px", fontFamily = "cambria")), crosshair = list(width = 40, color = "rgba(180,180,180,0.2)", zIndex = 0) ) %>% hc_title( text = "Tỷ lệ số pin cần cấp so với số pin tồn kho", margin = 20, align = "center", style = list(color = "black", fontWeight = "bold", fontFamily = "cambria", fontSize = "20px") ) %>% hc_plotOptions( column = list(states = list(hover = list(color = NULL), inactive = list(opacity = 0.3))), series = list(states = list(inactive = list(opacity = 0.3))) ) %>% hc_yAxis_multiples( list(lineWidth = 3, title = list(text = "Số pin", style = list(fontWeight = "bold", fontSize = "15px", fontFamily = "cambria")), labels = list(style = list(fontSize = "12px", fontFamily = "cambria"))), list(showLastLabel = TRUE, opposite = TRUE, title = list(text = "%HT", style = list(fontWeight = "bold", fontSize = "15px", fontFamily = "cambria")), labels = list(style = list(fontSize = "12px", fontFamily = "cambria"))) ) %>% hc_add_series( name = "Tổng pin tồn", data = as.list(default_data$tong_ton), states = list(hover = list(color = "#808080")) ) %>% hc_add_series( name = "Số pin cần cấp", data = as.list(default_data$tong_pin_can), states = list(hover = list(color = "#8DB600")) ) %>% hc_add_series( name = "Tỷ lệ (%)", data = as.list(default_data$ty_le), type = "spline", yAxis = 1, dataLabels = list(enabled = TRUE, format = "{y}%") ) %>% hc_tooltip( shared = TRUE, useHTML = TRUE, formatter = JS(" function() { var s = '' + this.x + '
